overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European harbor town on a sunny day. The character moves from a waterfront promenade past docks and boats, through cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed houses and stone buildings, ending in a narrow market street with wooden scaffolding.

events.description: character turns right away from the waterfront toward the town center

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the waterfront shore, passing wooden docks and boats moored in the canal

entered.detail: large stone bridge with archway spanning the canal in the distance
wooden pier and dock planks extending into the water
calm water of the harbor canal reflecting the sky
imposing stone building with large arched entrance and steep roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with a large stone bridge visible in the distance across the canal. Geralt walks along the shore past wooden docks, then turns right toward a large Gothic stone building, moving from the open waterfront into the town.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path along stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging along a cobblestone path with a stone wall and trees on the right, passing timber houses

notable_agents.action: townsman in brown clothing walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the path with grass and trees behind
tall cylindrical stone tower visible in the distant town center

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves along a cobblestone path bordered by a stone retaining wall and vegetation on the right. The waterfront recedes from view as he passes a timber-framed house and a townsman walking the opposite way, with a tall stone tower visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with timber and plaster buildings

events.description: character turns left around the corner of a building with a heraldic mural

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a residential area, passing a building with a painted heraldic mural and wooden stairs

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt sitting on the stone wall

entered.detail: stone building with large painted coat of arms and decorative red leaves on the facade
external wooden staircase leading to an upper floor
simple wooden picket fence along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a residential district with timber-framed houses. Geralt passes a distinctive building featuring a heraldic mural and wooden external stairs, then turns left around the corner. A man sits on a wall to the right, and wooden fences line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor market area with sailing ships

events.description: view opens up to reveal large sailing ships with red and white sails in the harbor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a bustling harbor market area with large sailing ships visible in the background

notable_agents.action: child in gray clothing running past Geralt toward the harbor

entered.detail: tall masts of large sailing ships with red and white striped sails docked in the harbor
wooden market stalls and tents set up along the right side of the street
stone building with arched windows and red tiled roof

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a bustling harbor market with large sailing ships visible in the distance. Geralt walks past stone buildings on the left and market stalls on the right. A child runs past him as he moves through the moderate crowd toward the ships.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with timber buildings and scaffolding

events.description: enters a narrower street with wooden scaffolding and timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a narrow street lined with stone and timber buildings, passing under wooden scaffolding

notable_agents.action: man standing under wooden awning watching Geralt pass

entered.detail: rough wooden scaffolding and planks covering the left side of the street
timber-framed building with large arched entrance at the end of the street
wooden cart or wagon parked on the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a narrower cobblestone street with buildings closer on both sides. He passes under wooden scaffolding on the left and a man standing under an awning on the right. The street leads toward a timber-framed building with a large archway, with wooden carts and construction materials visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunny waterfront promenade into the dense, narrow streets of a medieval harbor town. It begins along the shore past wooden docks and a distant stone bridge, moving away from the water as the camera turns toward a large Gothic stone building. As the open waterfront recedes, the path shifts into a residential district of cobblestones and timber-framed houses, passing a heraldic mural and wooden fences before turning a corner. The scene then expands into a bustling harbor market filled with stalls and a moderate crowd, with large sailing ships visible in the distance. Finally, the environment tightens as the camera enters a narrow street, passing under wooden scaffolding and construction materials toward a timber-framed building with a large archway.
